mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM SEASON_RANKINGS WHERE SEASON_PERIOD = #{season} AND SEASON_NO = #{seasonNo} ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM WEEKLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM MONTHLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM YEARLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, POINTS, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY POINTS DESC) AS RANK FROM MEMBERS ORDER BY POINTS DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
